Snake scales
QuoteReply

mfogell

Scholar
67 posts
Merchant Kaphiri sells them in Cresant Reach
▲ Page top
Rock Snakes
QuoteReply
# Feb 26 2018 at 3:38 AM Rating: Decent
Arog
Scholar
196 posts
Rock snakes in Ak'anon also drop snake scales. But they do not drop snake eggs.
▲ Page top
Another Vendor
QuoteReply
# Feb 11 2014 at 11:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1613348280850
1 post
These can also be purchased in Crescent Reach from Merchant Wyn'las at -1406.52, -1521.39, -86.71 for 1 silver per snake scale
▲ Page top
common
QuoteReply
# Aug 06 2007 at 1:08 PM Rating: Decent
snailish
4,580 posts
The level one snakes in butcherblock were dropping these most kills for me today.
▲ Page top
Another Vendor
QuoteReply
# Apr 05 2005 at 6:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592761921594
23 posts
Pardor the Blessed in East Commonlands also sells snake scales for 1 silver 1 copper.
▲ Page top
TY Vorish
QuoteReply
# Sep 11 2004 at 5:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362420255
19 posts
Thank you for your very informative post, this is a part of the 3rd skullcap for iksar. Glad to see that there is an informative post, and not just some moron rambling about how useless it is. Enough rambling here about how useful it is, hehe.
▲ Page top
Snake scales
QuoteReply
# Mar 09 2004 at 1:29 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592761943980
27 posts
They are also needed to cast the Skin like Scales spell. Only regular snake scales will work.
▲ Page top
